LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry
LeaderboardEntry.description: A score entry for a specific mini-game.

gameId.description: The ID of the mini game (carrot_catch, bunny_hop, hide_and_seek)

animalId.description: The animal played with (bunny, unicorn, etc.)

/leaderboards/{gameId}/entries/{entryId}.description: High scores for a specific mini-game.
